title: Fermented German Yeast Soup
description: A creamy and indulgent dish featuring a touch of sweetness from icing sugar, perfect for diabetic-friendly recipes.
instructions: In a small saucepan, mix the boiling water and yeast. Let sit for 5 minutes until fully dissolved.
Stir in the icing sugar, ensuring it is completely dissolved into the liquid mixture.
Gradually pour in the heavy cream while stirring continuously to avoid lumps forming.
Let the soup simmer over low heat for another 10 minutes or until thickened. Stir frequently to ensure uniformity.
